description: Yield management: optimize price dynamically, revenue management, seat selling

items.name: Price elasticity modeling
items.tactic: Know: demand curve (price vs quantity). If demand elastic = lower price increases revenue. If inelastic = raise price.

items.name: Scarcity-driven pricing
items.tactic: Hotel: 10 rooms left = raise price 30%. Flight: 5 seats left = raise price 50%. Real scarcity = real price power.

items.name: Personalized pricing (legal)
items.tactic: Customer value-based: enterprise = higher price, SMB = lower. Same product, different price based on willingness to pay (legal).
